calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
John Zanghi, Esq. for Plaintiff: Caritas Management Corp.
Plaintiff's Witnesses: Magali Echevarria, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Marco pena Guzman.
EXH. 1 - Lease Agreement---------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2 - Ten Day Notice----------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 3 - P.O.S.------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 380 Eddy St., #336, San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Back rent and Damages $1,690.88
Costs $278.00, for a Total of $1,968.88
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the EXHIBITS in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN P. ZANGHI, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORP., WHO IS REPRESENTED THIS DAY BY MS. MAGALY ECHEVARRIA, ALSO PRESENT. THERE IS NO APPEARANCE THIS DAY BY DEFENDANT MARCOS PENA GUZMAN.

THE MATTER IS TAKEN OFF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR DUE TO NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; D206 TRIAL DATE OF MONDAY, MAR-20-2006 REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218).
